data.title: Baby Trend Navigator 2-in-1 Stroller Wagon, Desert Tan

features: Super large cargo space with built-in seating for two and includes two 3-point safety harness belt
Adjustable dual canopies offers both children protection from the elements
Heavy duty frame offers durability and stability for your growing family
Two modes: strolling mode with the stroller handle and wagon mode with the hideaway pull handle
Parent tray with two cupholders and a center console for convenient storage space
Child Tray with two cup holders and center consoles for each child
